channel.title: Python on Edvin Teskeredzic
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Edvin Teskeredzic

item.title: NYT Spelling Bee: Dissected, Optimized, and Overthought
item.description: What happens when engineers play NYT Spelling Bee on their lunch break? Statistical analysis, obviously.

item.title: What is the rarest game of DotA2?
item.description: A combinatorics problem hiding inside 3.5 million matches.

item.title: Tame Python Chaos with uv: The Superpower Every AI Engineer Needs
item.description: An article I’ve written for ShiftMag about uv, a modern Python package and project manager that simplifies dependency management for AI engineers.

item.title: The little sine wave that could: abusing neural networks for fun and profit
item.description: You can hide easter eggs in AI models. What now?
